heading: Omitted
label: 590i–1 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , (the Department of Agriculture Appropriation Act, 1943), which related to furnishing photographs, mosaics, and maps required by the Soil Conservation Service, was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts. Similar provisions were contained in the following prior appropriation acts:act July 22, 1942, ch. 51656 Stat. 691, .July 1, 1941, ch. 26755 Stat. 434, .June 25, 1940, ch. 42154 Stat. 560, title I, .June 30, 1939, ch. 25353 Stat. 973, title I, .June 16, 1938, ch. 46452 Stat. 744, .June 29, 1937, ch. 40450 Stat. 429
